name: startup-playbook-advisor
description: Early-stage startup advisory skills for discovering opportunities, validating ideas, and persisting playbook artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Discover and validate startup ideas before building.
interface.longDescription: Guides founders through opportunity discovery, early-stage idea validation, AI-native product checks, target user discovery, paid demand checks, MVP scope, pricing tests, go-to-market planning, and project-local playbook artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Help me validate a startup idea.
Ask me the key questions before I build.
Turn this idea into a 7-day validation plan.
Mine international communities for startup opportunities.
Evaluate whether this AI-native product idea is worth building.
